entries.title: What next as XRP drops 3% under $1.40 on strong selling
Bitcoin loses $77,000, ether, solana slide as Hormuz standoff lifts oil to 3-week high

MARA Holdings targets bitcoin quantum threat and network resilience with new foundation
Bitcoin pulls back to $76,600 as rising oil price and Iran risks stall the rally

Bitcoin is climbing on thin volume, leaving rally vulnerable to macro shock
Cross-border B2B stablecoin payments to hit $5 trillion by 2035, says Juniper Research
Fidelity Digital Assets says bitcoin is leading crypto market stabilization
Canada’s crypto donation ban clears key vote with support from Conservatives
As the bitcoin price rises, futures may look bearish, but they're not, analyst says

Michael Saylor’s Strategy buys 3,273 bitcoin as it inches closer to its 1 million target
Bitmine buys $236 million in ether as Tom Lee touts ETH as 'wartime store of value'

Bitcoin funds take in $933 million as crypto ETFs hit highest AUM since February

Elon Musk’s Fight With Colorado Over AI Law Hits Pause as State Considers Revisions
entries.summary: The joint motion halts deadlines and enforcement in xAI’s lawsuit while Colorado lawmakers weigh changes to the state’s AI bias law.

entries.title: Aave-Led 'DeFi United' Relief Effort Raises $300 Million to Cover Kelp DAO Exploit Losses
entries.summary: The Aave-led relief effort has gained widespread support, securing enough commitments to replenish the swiped funds.

entries.title: OpenAI Is Building Its Own Smartphone Chip With Qualcomm and MediaTek: Report
entries.summary: Six weeks after telling staff to stop chasing distractions, OpenAI is reportedly planning a phone targeting 400 million units a year.

entries.title: Bitcoin Developer Plans to 'Reassign' Coins Linked to Satoshi Nakamoto in Hard Fork
entries.summary: Paul Sztorc’s proposed eCash fork would give investors coins cloned from wallets believed to belong to Bitcoin creator Satoshi Nakamoto.

entries.title: Taylor Swift Seeks Trademarks for Her Voice and Image to Fight AI Fakes
entries.summary: The trademark applications aim to strengthen her ability to fight AI-generated deepfakes, as image generation tools advance.

entries.title: Fed Confirms What Tech Developers Have Feared for Two Years
entries.summary: A new Federal Reserve study links ChatGPT's launch to a sharp halving of U.S. programmer job growth—the first institutional-level evidence connecting AI adoption to measurable developer hiring declines.

entries.title: Malicious Web Pages Are Hijacking AI Agents, And Some Are Going After Your PayPal
entries.summary: Google's security team scanned billions of web pages and found real payloads designed to trick AI agents into sending money, deleting files, and leaking credentials.

entries.title: Google Employees Demand CEO Block Military AI Contracts in Open Letter
entries.summary: Some 580 Google employees have signed the letter to CEO Sundar Pichai, citing ethical concerns over military use of AI.

entries.title: Publicly Traded Strive Buys $60 Million in Bitcoin, Plans BTC Business Summit
entries.summary: Strive Inc. purchased 789 more Bitcoin while its subsidiary prepares to educate business leaders on corporate crypto adoption.

entries.title: Trump Walks Back Prediction Market Criticism, Says 'Smart People' He Knows Like Them
entries.summary: Trump said last week he didn’t like prediction markets, but then changed his tune, arguing the U.S. should not get left behind in the space.

entries.title: Crypto Exchange Gemini Launches Agentic Trading Feature for AI Agents
entries.summary: Gemini has integrated AI models like Claude and ChatGPT to execute automated trading strategies via an open protocol.

entries.title: Litecoin Rewrites Transaction History After Exploit, Apologizes for Social Posts
entries.summary: Litecoin was affected by a bug this weekend that allowed an attacker to transfer digital assets—transactions that were later wiped away.

entries.title: OpenAI's Sam Altman Apologizes for Not Alerting Police Before Tumbler Ridge Mass Shooting
entries.summary: Sam Altman admitted that OpenAI should have warned law enforcement after banning the suspect’s account months before the attack.

entries.title: China Blocks Meta's $2 Billion Acquisition of AI Startup Manus
entries.summary: Beijing's intervention in Meta's startup acquisition signals tighter scrutiny of foreign investments in China's AI sector.

entries.title: Microsoft and OpenAI Rework AI Deal, Cutting Exclusivity and AGI Provisions
entries.summary: The restructured deal with Microsoft removes exclusivity provisions and revenue-sharing arrangements, freeing OpenAI to pursue additional allies.

entries.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Makes Biggest Ethereum Buy So Far in 2026, Hitting 5 Million ETH Milestone
entries.summary: BitMine Immersion Technologies now holds over 5 million ETH, following the leading Ethereum treasury firm's biggest buy since December.

entries.title: Bitcoin Giant Strategy's Buying Pace Falls 91% Amid STRC Cooldown
entries.summary: The Bitcoin-buying firm leaned on common shares to grow its holdings after STRC powered its largest purchase in 16 months.

entries.title: Money Launderer Sentenced to 70 Months Over $263M Crypto Social-Engineering Scheme
entries.summary: California money launderer Evan Tangeman admitted to having processed millions in stolen cryptocurrency proceeds.

entries.title: Bitcoin ETFs Extend Longest Win Streak Since September, But Spot Demand Lags
entries.summary: The nine-day inflow streak saw spot Bitcoin ETFs draw in $2.1 billion, but experts warn of “net negative” on-chain demand.

entries.title: Morning Minute: NFTs Storm Back, Led by Bored Apes
entries.summary: Bitcoin made its highest weekly close since January. Western Union is launching a stablecoin. And NFTs are making a major comeback.

entries.title: France Charges 88, Including Minors, in Crypto ‘Wrench Attack’ Crackdown
entries.summary: France has recorded 135 crypto-linked incidents since 2023, amid a nationwide surge in so-called “wrench attacks."

entries.title: Western Union to Launch Solana-Based Stablecoin Plus ‘Stable Card’ Next Month
entries.summary: The USDPT stablecoin launching next month will serve as an alternative to SWIFT for agent settlements rather than consumer transactions.

entries.title: Coachella Uses Google DeepMind AI to Test the Future of Live Entertainment
entries.summary: Coachella is experimenting with AI-built artist tools, immersive digital worlds, and 3D performance archives that could shape future fan experiences.

entries.title: Your AI Agent Can Now Groan While Untangling Your Vibe Coded Mess
entries.summary: A new GitHub plugin makes your coding agent emit escalating human moans as it suffers through your spaghetti code.

entries.title: Elon Musk’s Grok Most Likely Among Top AI Models to Reinforce Delusions: Study
entries.summary: Researchers found that xAI's Grok was the riskiest AI model tested, often validating delusions and offering dangerous advice.

entries.title: Bitcoin Hit Its Highest Price Since January—Why VanEck Analysts See More Potential Gains
entries.summary: Bitcoin hash rate recovery and negative funding rates signal potential gains ahead, according to the ETF provider's latest network analysis.

entries.title: Japan’s Bitbank rolls out crypto-linked credit card that pays bills in bitcoin
entries.summary: The card will allow users to pay their credit card bill in bitcoin, and receive a 0.5% cashback in crypto for their spending.

entries.title: Saipan woman gets 71 months in prison for bitcoin fraud targeting senior victims
entries.summary: The criminal built trust with her targets and solicited bitcoin investments under false pretenses, according to the DOJ.

entries.title: ZetaChain halts cross-chain transactions following attack on smart contract
entries.summary: The attack has only impacted internal ZetaChain team wallets, and no user funds were affected, the team said.

entries.title: White House crypto advisor hints at  ‘big announcement’ on Trump’s strategic bitcoin reserve in coming weeks
entries.summary: Executive Director of the President’s Council of Advisors for Digital Assets Patrick Witt said bitcoin reserve legislation is progressing.

entries.title: ‘We don’t take Satoshi’s bitcoin’: eCash fork sparks backlash over ‘reassigned’ coins
entries.summary: The eCash fork will act as a live test of Paul Sztorc’s long-running drivechains-sidechains vision for the bitcoin network.

entries.title: Acting AG Blanche: DOJ has ‘fundamentally changed the game’ for developers
entries.summary: Acting AG Blanche offered some reassurance to software developers as the Justice Department continues its case against Roman Storm.

entries.title: MARA Foundation to foster long-term adoption of Bitcoin, including resilience against quantum and security budget risks
entries.summary: The recently formed MARA Foundation said it will focus on the long-term health, resilience, and adoption of the Bitcoin protocol.

entries.title: Rep. Begich plans revival of bitcoin strategic reserve bill under new name to codify Trump’s executive order
entries.summary: Legislation to establish a strategic bitcoin reserve in the U.S. is set to be reintroduced in the next few weeks.

entries.title: Sen. Tillis becomes ‘latest roadblock’ for crypto bill as he pushes ethics provisions, TD Cowen says
entries.summary: Thom Tillis has reportedly said he would not support the crypto bill if it does not include conflict-of-interest provisions.

entries.title: Aven bitcoin Visa card will offer BTC-backed line of credit of up to $1 million
entries.summary: Aven's new bitcoin credit card will offer fixed-rate, fixed-term loans of up to 10 years at a 7.99% APR as well as unlimited 2% cash back.

entries.title: DeFi United push hits $300M as Consensys and Joseph Lubin contribute 30,000 ETH
entries.summary: The industry-wide effort dubbed DeFi United had raised roughly $235 million worth of Ethereum as of Monday.

entries.title: ‘Clear runway’ to 5,000 BTC: Benchmark initiates Asian food platform DDC, sees 70% upside
entries.summary: DDC is investing in an "AI-driven operating system" to help guide its bitcoin purchases as it aims to reach 5,000 BTC by year-end 2026.

entries.title: Luca Netz on building a brand people actually love
entries.summary: Netz explains how Pudgy Penguins is evolving from NFTs into a consumer brand by focusing on culture, IP, and mass adoption over speculation.

entries.title: Gemini rolls out Agentic Trading allowing AI bots to directly manage crypto exchange trading accounts
entries.summary: Gemini referred to the feature as “the first agentic trading tool to be available directly through a regulated US-based exchange.”

entries.title: ‘The best days of crypto are ahead’: Bernstein sees asymmetric upside and structurally longer bull cycle
entries.summary: New institutional on-ramps, strong flows, and exhausted retail selling points to renewed asymmetric upside for bitcoin, Bernstein said.

entries.title: Strive acquires 789 BTC, bumping ninth-largest corporate bitcoin treasury over 14,000 BTC
entries.summary: Strive also recently tightened its preferred stock's trading range while boosting its monthly dividend yield to 12.75%.

entries.title: BitMine’s ether holdings top 5.078 million after largest purchase since December
entries.summary: BitMine said its ether holdings climbed to 5.078 million tokens after another 101,901 ETH purchase last week.

entries.title: TD Cowen reiterates buy rating on Smarter Web Company, says it remains UK’s only scaled bitcoin treasury vehicle
entries.summary: TD Cowen said The Smarter Web Company has strengthened its position as the only UK-listed bitcoin treasury vehicle at scale.

entries.title: The Block appoints veteran media operator Steve Chung as CEO
entries.summary: Chung takes over from Larry Cermak, who remains President of The Block, overseeing research, data, and product.

entries.title: ‘The beat goes on’: Michael Saylor’s Strategy adds 3,273 bitcoin for $255 million as holdings reach 818,334 BTC
entries.summary: Strategy's holdings account for 3.9% of the total 21 million bitcoin supply — worth around $63.7 billion.
